assertions.title: Open in Apple Music Link Opens New Tab

steps.action: Open browser with session c0a7a28a9ba4__link to http://localhost:3000
steps.observed: Page loaded, title 'Die drei ??? Album Viewer' displayed

steps.action: Wait for album to load and verify 'Open in Apple Music' button state
steps.observed: Button is enabled (is enabled returned true)

steps.action: Note the album's Apple Music URL
steps.expected: URL is a valid Apple Music URL
Target attribute is _blank for new tab behavior
New tab opens with Apple Music URL
steps.observed: Click opened new tab, URL navigated to Apple Music album page

steps.expected: Two tabs open:localhost:3000 and Apple Music
steps.observed: Tab list shows [0] localhost:3000, [1] Apple Music album page

steps.expected: Apple Music page loads with album content
steps.observed: Tab title: 'Folge 87: Wolfsgesicht – Album von Die??? – Apple Music'
No errors - only Vite debug messages and a non-critical React DevTools warning

summary: Tested 1 assertion: VAL-CROSS-010 passed. The 'Open in Apple Music' button correctly opens a new browser tab pointing to the album's Apple Music URL. The link has target='_blank' attribute, is enabled when an album is loaded, and points to a valid music.apple.com URL. No console errors detected.
